productName: SMC - Infused Joint Pack - Original - Chernobyl - 5g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Chernobyl supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of lime, citrus, and lemon, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
